positive: A vibrant, symmetrical illustration of celestial flora and fauna in an Art Nouveau style. The centerpiece is a luminous, stylized moon surrounded by bioluminescent, trailing vines, intricately detailed hummingbirds drinking nectar from oversized, glowing blossoms, and mythical, elegant moths with stained-glass wings. The composition is highly symmetrical and radially balanced. Style includes deep indigo and teal backgrounds contrasted with metallic gold leaf accents, glowing emerald greens, and vibrant coral pinks. Clean silhouettes, high contrast, suitable for screen printing, flat graphic design elements, mystical, whimsical. Vector art aesthetic, engraved line work detail, centralized focus, high detail, solid color separation.
negative: blur, messy, low resolution, text, words, watermark, signature, artifacts, poor composition, grayscale, monochrome, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, photorealism, realistic, 3d, messy lines, grain
